description: Convert a region art specification into PixelLab top-down tileset generation arguments.
prompt_template: You are converting a RUNECHAIN region art spec into PixelLab create_topdown_tileset arguments. Return exactly one JSON object containing the API call args; do not call PixelLab and do not include generated images. Mirror the request-body style used in scripts/gen-pixellab-assets.js: include a rich description, image_size with width and height, high_top_down view, thin dark outline, simple shading, medium detail, a dark gothic muted color_palette, no_background, and any tileset-specific fields needed to describe terrain, props, edges, walls, floors, hazards, and landmark motifs. If the region art spec includes a style reference or palette anchor, express it as an optional directions or reference field following the same plain-object request-body convention used by the script. Preserve RUNECHAIN invariants: Gold may only describe cosmetic reward flavor or visual dressing and must never imply power, speed, combat advantage, progression acceleration, sale eligibility, wallet activity, signing, or funds movement.
